prompt:
Retail window poster — 2:3 portrait — generic, non-branded signage announcing peptides are sold at this shop. Editorial-quality typographic hero poster.

LOCKED THEME — every detail in this poster matches the clean-cream / modern / Aesop-aligned design language used in our approved launch flyer series:
- Background: warm cream #F4F0E6 seamless gradient, slightly darker at the corners (~#E9E2D2) for subtle depth, very fine paper-grain texture. NO color blocks, NO neon, NO charcoal background, NO oxblood, NO vintage flourishes.
- Typography palette: charcoal #1A1A1A primary, warm-gray #6B6258 at 75% opacity for kickers.
- Type system: a clean modern sans-serif with TWO weights working together — a HEAVY bold weight for the dominant word and a MATCHING THIN/LIGHT weight for the secondary word (mirroring a Söhne Breit Bold / Söhne Light pairing).
- Hairlines: thin warm-charcoal horizontal divider lines, used sparingly to separate type blocks.
- Layout: lots of breathing room, refined editorial restraint, magazine-grade.
- Color accent (optional, very minimal): a small warm muted gold #D6B36A may appear as one thin trim element only.

LAYOUT:
- Centered horizontally near the upper third of the canvas, a small caps eyebrow line "AVAILABLE INSIDE" in tracked-out warm-gray, ~20% canvas width.
- Below the eyebrow, the MASSIVE headline "PEPTIDES." set in the heavy bold sans-serif weight, ALL CAPS, single line, charcoal #1A1A1A, spanning ~85% of canvas width, generous letterspacing, the period a solid square dot. This is the dominant visual element — readable from a long distance.
- Just beneath the headline, a single thin charcoal horizontal hairline rule, ~45% canvas width, centered.
- Beneath the rule, a single line "SOLD HERE" in the matching THIN/LIGHT weight of the same typeface, ALL CAPS, charcoal #1A1A1A, generously tracked, ~30% canvas width centered.
- Lower-third of the canvas reserved for breathing room.
- At ~88% from top, a tiny kicker in tracked-out caps centered: "RESEARCH-GRADE  ·  ASK A TEAM MEMBER" in warm-gray #6B6258 at 75% opacity.
- Bottom 8% empty negative space.

The whole poster reads quiet, refined, premium — a poster you'd see in an Aesop or upscale wellness boutique window.

Negative: no brand names, no logos, no specific brand identities, no photographs, no people, no QR codes, no neon, no busy backgrounds, no extra text beyond what is specified, no chrome, no AI-perfect splashes, no levitating products, no vintage flourishes, no charcoal backgrounds, no oxblood red, no Victorian filigree, no copperplate script.

Retail window poster — 2:3 portrait — generic, non-branded signage announcing peptides are sold at this shop. Modern minimal layout with a single clean line-art vial icon and a stacked headline.

LOCKED THEME — every detail in this poster matches the clean-cream / modern / Aesop-aligned design language used in our approved launch flyer series:
- Background: warm cream #F4F0E6 seamless gradient, slightly darker at the corners (~#E9E2D2) for subtle depth, very fine paper-grain texture. NO color blocks, NO neon, NO charcoal background, NO oxblood, NO vintage flourishes.
- Typography palette: charcoal #1A1A1A primary, warm-gray #6B6258 at 75% opacity for kickers.
- Type system: a clean modern sans-serif with TWO weights working together — a HEAVY bold weight for the dominant word and a MATCHING THIN/LIGHT weight for the secondary word (mirroring a Söhne Breit Bold / Söhne Light pairing).
- Hairlines: thin warm-charcoal horizontal divider lines, used sparingly to separate type blocks.
- Layout: lots of breathing room, refined editorial restraint, magazine-grade.
- Color accent (optional, very minimal): a small warm muted gold #D6B36A may appear as one thin trim element only.

LAYOUT:
- Upper third: a clean simple line-art icon of a generic research peptide vial (slim cylindrical body with a small flat crimp top, simple double-line outline only, no fill, charcoal #1A1A1A, sized to ~16% of canvas width). Horizontally centered at ~22% from top. Minimalist, editorial — NOT a photograph, NOT a 3D render.
- Below the icon, a thin charcoal hairline horizontal rule, ~30% canvas width, centered.
- Headline stacked on TWO lines centered horizontally beneath the rule:
  - Line 1: "PEPTIDES" in the heavy bold sans-serif weight, ALL CAPS, charcoal #1A1A1A, ~80% canvas width, tightly tracked.
  - Line 2: "Sold Here." in the matching THIN/LIGHT weight of the same typeface, MIXED CASE (capital S, capital H, period), charcoal #1A1A1A, ~55% canvas width.
- Below the headline at ~80% from top, a small two-line kicker centered:
  - Line 1: "RESEARCH-GRADE" tracked caps, warm-gray #6B6258 at 75% opacity
  - Line 2: "Inquire inside for selection" in light italic serif accent, warm-gray.
- Refined, restrained, calm.

Negative: no brand names, no logos, no specific brand identities, no photographs, no people, no QR codes, no neon, no busy backgrounds, no extra text beyond what is specified, no chrome, no AI-perfect splashes, no levitating products, no vintage flourishes, no charcoal backgrounds, no oxblood red, no Victorian filigree, no copperplate script.

Retail window poster — 2:3 portrait — generic, non-branded signage announcing peptides are sold at this shop. Editorial layout with three clean line-art vials in a row.

LOCKED THEME — every detail in this poster matches the clean-cream / modern / Aesop-aligned design language used in our approved launch flyer series:
- Background: warm cream #F4F0E6 seamless gradient, slightly darker at the corners (~#E9E2D2) for subtle depth, very fine paper-grain texture. NO color blocks, NO neon, NO charcoal background, NO oxblood, NO vintage flourishes.
- Typography palette: charcoal #1A1A1A primary, warm-gray #6B6258 at 75% opacity for kickers.
- Type system: a clean modern sans-serif with TWO weights working together — a HEAVY bold weight for the dominant word and a MATCHING THIN/LIGHT weight for the secondary word (mirroring a Söhne Breit Bold / Söhne Light pairing).
- Hairlines: thin warm-charcoal horizontal divider lines, used sparingly to separate type blocks.
- Layout: lots of breathing room, refined editorial restraint, magazine-grade.
- Color accent (optional, very minimal): a small warm muted gold #D6B36A may appear as one thin trim element only.

LAYOUT:
- Upper-middle of the canvas: THREE clean simple line-art icons of generic research peptide vials arranged side-by-side in a single horizontal row, evenly spaced. Each vial: slim cylindrical body, small flat crimp top, simple double-line outline only, no fill, charcoal #1A1A1A, each ~12% canvas width. The trio horizontally centered at ~25% from top, with a small warm gold #D6B36A accent dot above each vial's crimp top (tiny — like a 4mm filled circle, one above each vial in matching gold).
- Below the trio, a single thin charcoal horizontal hairline rule, ~40% canvas width, centered.
- Headline centered horizontally: "PEPTIDES" in the heavy bold sans-serif weight, ALL CAPS, charcoal #1A1A1A, ~85% canvas width, tightly tracked, single line. Massive.
- Below the headline: a small caps line "·  AVAILABLE IN STORE  ·" in the matching THIN/LIGHT weight, tracked out, charcoal #1A1A1A, ~38% canvas width centered.
- Lower portion: small two-line kicker centered at ~85% from top:
  - Line 1: "RESEARCH-GRADE PEPTIDES" tracked caps, warm-gray #6B6258 at 70% opacity
  - Line 2: "Speak to a team member for selection" in matching thin sans-serif italic accent, warm-gray.
- Bottom 7% empty negative space.

Negative: no brand names, no logos, no specific brand identities, no photographs, no people, no QR codes, no neon, no busy backgrounds, no extra text beyond what is specified, no chrome, no AI-perfect splashes, no levitating products, no vintage flourishes, no charcoal backgrounds, no oxblood red, no Victorian filigree, no copperplate script.
